mnemonics: Charlie's Monkey Learned Toys Ate Dynamite
Father Makes Lunch To Avoid Drinking Nachos
keyPoints: Characteristics of a Tree: No cycles, Every edge has a unique destination
Properties of Pendant Vertices: Only connected to one edge, No incoming or outgoing edges
Distance and Centres in a Tree: Shortest path between nodes, Centroid divides the tree into two equal parts
Rooted Trees: One node is the root, All other nodes are descendants of the root
Binary Trees: Each node has at most two children, Left and Right subtrees are mirror images
